evidence: The official PDF renders the case caption with the vs/parties correctly paired: 'State of North Dakota, Plaintiff and Appellee' on one side and 'Angel Alberto Torres-Sosa, Defendant and Appellant' on the other, with 'v.' between them. The DB text has the 'v.' positioned after the plaintiff's name but before 'Plaintiff and Appellee', breaking the logical and standard legal caption format. This is a caption sequencing error that must be corrected to match the authoritative printed source.
note: This is the only substantive text divergence from the source PDF. All other differences are whitespace/formatting artifacts (page headers, line breaks, form-feeds) which are known PDF artifacts. All citations, case names, judge names, justice names, and body text paragraphs are accurate.
